title: tetrachondraceae
intro: Tetrachondraceae is a family of flowering plants, consisting of 5 genera and approximately 22 species. It is primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions, particularly in Asia and the Pacific Islands. The family is characterized by its unique combination of characteristics, including its distinctive flowers and leaves. The Tetrachondraceae family is often referred to as the "false heath" family due to its superficial resemblance to the heath family, Ericaceae.
